top_signals.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UK financial regulators to begin overseeing Critical Third Parties announced by HM Treasury
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England, the Prudential Regulation Authority and the Financial Conduct Authority will start overseeing the first Critical Third Parties on Monday 13 July 2026, following designation by HM Treasury.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan finance minister urges giant pension fund to invest more at home
top_signals.summary: Yen, bonds and stocks buoyed by Satsuki Katayama’s call for investors to shift from foreign to domestic assets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
top_signals.summary: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says investors are making a mistake with the trillion-dollar tech giants
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that investors are making a mistake when comparing all the "Magnificent Seven" companies when they all have vastly different businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UBS helped trigger exodus from Blue Owl private credit fund
top_signals.summary: Bank advised some clients to cut exposure, hitting a fund it had been instrumental in setting up

top_signals.title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
top_signals.summary: Meta is an apparent breach of EU laws due to addictive design features on Instagram and Facebook, according to preliminary findings on Friday.

top_signals.title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
top_signals.summary: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.
